message:
feat(ops): add historical analytics screen and wire into TUI navigation

Introduce HistoricalAnalyticsScreen as a new dedicated screen for
historical query analytics and explainability metrics, separating this
concern from the existing AlertsSloScreen which was previously
overloaded to serve double duty.

app.rs: register the new screen in the OpsApp shell, assign it a
dedicated ScreenId, update fleet and project screens to route
`set_analytics_screen_id()` to the new analytics screen (previously
routed to alerts), add `nav.analytics` action handler, and expose
`analytics_screen()` accessor for testing/inspection.

screens/mod.rs: register and re-export HistoricalAnalyticsScreen.

screens/historical_analytics.rs: new screen implementation with
analytics display and interaction model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
